hero.title: Kufaka sicelo semklamo wekufinyeleleka
hero.lead: I-IATF ibuketa ticelo temiklamo yekufinyeleleka letisuka esidzingo mbamba.
support: Awudzingi lwati lolubanti ngalendzaba, kodvwa kufanele ube nenkinga lecacile kutsi utsintseka kubani nekutsi kungani ibalulekile.

items.label: Iwebhusayithi
items.body: Sebentisa lelifomu lelilandzelako kutfumela sicelo lesihlelekile.

items.label: I-imeyili
items.body: Tfumela lesicelo ngalokucondzile ku: {{contact.requestsEmail}}Ticelo te-imeyili tingaba ngemarekhodi esicelo semphakatsi ngemuva kwekubuyeketwa nekucashwa.

items.label: Kungevani
items.body: Cala lapho nangabe loko kumelula. sicelo sisengenele luhlolo lolufanako.

guidance.title: Ngaphambi kwekutsi utfumele sicelo
paragraphs: I-IATF isebenta emphakatsini. ticelo tingahlanganiswa bese tishicilelwa njengemarekhodi esicelo semphakatsi ku-GitHub, kulewebhusayithi, nobe kokubili.

Ungafaki emakheli langasese, tinombolo telucingo, imininingwane yetekwelashwa, nobe umniningwano lomayelana nemuntfu ngamunye losebentisa ematheknoloji lasitako ngaphandle nangabe kunesidzingo futsi awuvumelani ne-IATF kutsi iwuhlolisise.
I-IATF isusa imininingwane lengadzingeki yekuchumana nemuntfu ngaphambi kwekushicilela lirekhodi lesicelo.

review.title: Kulindzela kubuyeketa
paragraphs: Kufaka sicelo akusiso sicinisekiso sekutsi utawemukelwa.
I-IATF ihlola ticelo tekuhambisana nemsebenti, kuhambisana nekusebenta, kubaluleka, kanye nekutsi lomsebenti ufanelekile yini kutsi ufakwe ku-repository yemphakatsi.
Letinye ticelo tingahle tilahlwe, tibekelwe eceleni nobe tihlelwe kabusha ngaphambi kwekutsi temukelwe.

fields.name: Imininingwane yekuchumana
fields.label: Imininingwane yekuchumana
fields.helper: Likheli le-e-mail nobe i-Discord handle kwentela kulandzelela.

fields.name: extraUmongo walendzaba
fields.label: Umongo longetiwe
fields.helper: Chaza nobe ngabe yini lengasita ekuchazeni sidzingo: kutsi kungani kubalulekile, tibonelo, ticondziso, umbono lowetayelekile wesofthiwe, nobe tinkinga tesikhatsi.

fields.name: openSourceConsent
fields.label: Uyakutsakasela yini kutfutfukiswa kwemitfombo levulekile?
fields.helper: Imiklamo leyemukelwe yimiculu yahulumende ngephasi kwe-IATF.

items: ilayisensi ye-copyleft yekusebentisa ikhodi nematheksthi yemklamo

header.title: Sicelo lesifishane futsi lesicacile sanele kutsi sicale

paragraphs: Nangabe unesidzingo mbamba sekufinyeleleka futsi ucabanga kutsi kufanele kube ngumklamo wemphakatsi, sitfumelele wona.
